case_title: PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. CESAR CUAHUTEMOC GARCIA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-10-2014 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-10-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-10-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ--LEGAL ASSISTANT/COLLECTION DEPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, CESAR CUAHUTEMOC $992.81 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,077.81 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
